specification:
Type: Concept diagram **sim-id:** genetic-heterogeneity-map
**Library:** vis-network
**Status:** Specified A network diagram showing the relationship between genetic heterogeneity, locus heterogeneity, and allelic heterogeneity. The central node is "Same Phenotype." Branching from it are two paths: one showing multiple different genes (locus heterogeneity) with examples, and one showing multiple mutations in the same gene (allelic heterogeneity) with examples. Nodes are color-coded by type (phenotype, gene, mutation).
